temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A tight close-up shows a man's face, his dark hair damp with sweat. His eyes are wide with a mix of fear and intense concentration as he looks down, seemingly at something out of frame. The lighting is dim and moody, highlighting the sweat on his skin. (Storyline: This opening shot immediately establishes a tense and dramatic mood, suggesting the character is in a state of high emotional or physical distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A high-pitched, ethereal vocal melody begins, accompanied by a low, ominous drone, creating a suspenseful and atmospheric soundscape.)
(00:04-00:07) The scene abruptly cuts to a wide shot of a desolate, ruined building at sunset. The sky is filled with dramatic, dark clouds, and the sun is a bright, hazy orb on the horizon. A lone, dark silhouette of a figure stands in the foreground, looking out over the ruins. (Storyline: This cut establishes a bleak and post-apocalyptic setting, contrasting the character's internal turmoil with an external world of ruin and desolation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ethereal vocal melody continues, linking the character's emotional state to the desolate scenery.)
